title: Eco Paper Christmas Baubles - Honeycomb Green Fir Trees - Set of 3
features: Eco-Friendly Design: Crafted from durable paper, these honeycomb tree baubles add an eco-conscious touch to your holiday decor.
Easy to Hang: Comes with a convenient string for easy hanging on your Christmas tree or around the home.
Compact & Reusable: These lightweight baubles are collapsible, making them easy to store and reuse year after year.

Size: H 10cm x W 8cm Material: Card Add a charming and eco-friendly touch to your holiday decor with the Festive Wonderland 3 Honeycomb Paper Christmas Tree Baubles. These beautifully crafted baubles are made from durable paper with a unique honeycomb design that adds dimension and texture to your Christmas tree or festive display. Each bauble comes with a string for easy hanging, and their collapsible design allows for compact storage and reusability. Perfect for those looking to combine style and sustainability this holiday season. Safety Warning Warning: Keep out of reach of children. This product contains small parts that may pose a choking hazard. Do not expose to open flames or high heat.
